attr.title: Zelda II: Enhanced
attr.desc: Zelda II Enhanced adds a ton of QoL improvements, widescreen, new areas, and new collectibles. The game is arguably much easier to play through.
attr.inst: Download the 1.0.0.2 zip from https://hoverbat.itch.io/ziiaol and extract it in the zelda2enhanced/assets folder.
attr.inst_md: Download the 1.0.0.2 zip from [Itch.io](https://hoverbat.itch.io/ziiaol) and extract it in the `zelda2enhanced/assets` folder.
